message:
fix(brenner-loop): browser-safe UUID generation + session-machine actions

- Replace node:crypto import with browser-safe crypto.randomUUID() check
- Add fallback for older environments that lack crypto.randomUUID
- Add transition actions to session-machine (submitHypothesis, refine,
  completeOperator, addEvidence) for proper state updates
- Add hypothesis-arena tests for UUID-based ID generation
- Update analytics.ts with browser-safe UUID generation
